titleStmt.title: SII 23.274: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 274. (A.R. No. 274 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same base Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 9: 1125-26 A.D.

summary.p: This is a mutilated and damaged inscription with the inscribed stones disarranged (in renovation). It seems to register the uḷvari (execution ?) of the document for the tax-free grant of lands, made by the king in two separate villages Tribhuvana muḻuduḍaiviḷāgam and Nallāḍi, for burning a number of lamps in the temple and in the hall called the Vikramaśōḻan-tirumāḷigai (in the temple premises). The income from these lands was fixed in money from the former village and in paddy in the case of the latter.
It is possible that parts of two inscriptions have been mixed up in the pieces.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti puyattirunila maṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷ puyattiṉ varai mārvaṉ tanateṉappeṟ ṟampuṇarnta kaṟpiṉaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakattiruppatticaitoṟum tiki
maṉṉu maṇmuḻutuṅ kaḷippa maṉuneṟi vaḷarttu taṉkoyil koṟṟa vācalpuṟattu maṇināvoṭuṅka vicai ceḻiyar veñcuram puka cera
taraṇimuḻutuṭaiyāḷ tirumāliṉ tirumaṇimārvattaruḷ viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripatmarāna tribhuvanaccakravarttikaḷ śrīvikra
ḻikaikkuḷḷu tiruvaṇukkaṉ tirununtāviḷakkāka Eriyavaitta muṉṟu nilaiyaṉ pittaḷai viḷakku kku Āṟukku tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka Iv vūril kāram ḷaiyum nilat Oṉpatāvatu tribhuvanamuḻutuṭai viḷākam nilam Iruveliyināl nilavopāti paḻaviṟai poṉ patinañkaḻañce Ira
ñcukku paḻaviṟaiyopāti niccayitta poṉ muppattu mukkaḻañcaraiye muṉṟu mañcāṭiyum Āṟuma koyilil vikkiramacoḻaṉ tirumāmāḷikaikku Uḷḷuk koyilaic cūḻa Eriyakkaṭavitāka vaitta Eṭṭu Irupatiṉāl viḷakku nūṟṟu Aṟupatum Iraṇṭu nilai viḷakku nūṟṟu Irupatiṉāl viḷakku Iruṉū
pattu Oṉpatiṉ kaḻañce Eṭṭu mañcāṭiyum Eḻumā niccayitta poṉ ṉūṟṟu Eṇpattu Oru kaḻañce m Antarāyattukku Iṟukkum kācil kācu nāṟpatteṭṭe mukkāle Irumāvaraiyum yāṇṭu pati viḷak kuppuṟamāka Ittevaṟkku Iṟaiyili Iṭṭamaikku Ivai puraveri tiṇaikkaḷattu mukave
Ivai viracoḻap pallavaraiyaṉeṉ Eḻuttu svastiśrī nallāṭi tiru viḷakkuppuṟamāka tevate yili Iṭṭapaṭikku Uḷvari kalveṭṭu Uṭai yār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyil ccūḻavum Ik koyilil niruttamaṇṭapattu Eriyakkaṭavitāka vaitta nilaiviḷakkukaḷil canti
5 nāḻikku niccayitta nellu Āyirattu nānūṟṟaimpattu Oṉpatin kalane tūṇi Aṟunāḻiyum yāṇṭu pattāvatumutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭa tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka paḻaiyanūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai purovari tiṇaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi pacuvūrūṭaiyā neḻuttu Ivai pu
Digital edition of SII 23.274 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
